elements.description: Typed text document with headers including 'Released By:', 'Info:', and 'XMT:'. The text lists various US government departments and agencies. The word 'UNCLASSIFIED' appears at the top and bottom. A page number 'Page 7 of 7' is in the bottom right corner.
A rectangular box containing the typed text 'Released in Full' located near the bottom center of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text and a stamp/label, with no photographs, sketches, or other visual elements present.
